text:
29.11.2012 19:50, Edwin Groothuis:
> Maintainer of net-mgmt/flow-tools-ng,
>
> Please note that PR ports/173996 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/173996
>

This one is not for me but rather for maintainer of net-mgmt/p5-Cflow. 
I'll add him.

-- 
Sphinx of black quartz, judge my vow.
